hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+commit'; then npm run test; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Tests failed — fix them before committing"}'; exit 1; fi; fi
